_readme: Templates for Tavily query strings. Placeholders: {label} (primary search phrase from seed LLM then identity then CLI query), {institution}, {program_name}, {seed_url}, {course_title}, {course_id}. Domain restriction (include_domains) is applied in code from CLI base_url, not in these strings.

composition.label_resolution: Prefer atlas_search_context.official_program_label when non-empty; else identity institution + program_name; else CLI user_query; else fallback_label.

queries: {label} degree plan curriculum map required courses by term
{label} which college school department hosts program

generic_placeholder_queries: {label} required course list degree requirements catalog
